ogTitle: Watarru vs Waterfall Gully: Climate Safety

heading: Watarru vs Waterfall Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Watarru, South Australia and Waterfall Gully, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Watarru has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Waterfall Gully (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Watarru or Waterfall Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Watarru has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Waterfall Gully scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Watarru scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Waterfall Gully scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Watarru or Waterfall Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Watarru has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
